name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: Can mine stone and coal ore. Crafted from 3 planks and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: Can mine iron ore and lapis. Crafted from 3 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: Can mine diamond ore, redstone, and gold. Crafted from 3 iron ingots and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: Fast, durable pickaxe. Can mine obsidian. Crafted from 3 diamonds and 2 sticks.

name: Netherite Pickaxe
description: The strongest pickaxe. Crafted by upgrading a diamond pickaxe with a netherite ingot.

name: Wooden Axe
description: Chops wood faster. Crafted from 3 planks and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Axe
description: Basic axe. Crafted from 3 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Axe
description: Durable iron axe. Crafted from 3 iron ingots and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Axe
description: Very fast axe. Crafted from 3 diamonds and 2 sticks.

name: Wooden Sword
description: Lowest tier sword. Crafted from 2 planks and 1 stick.

name: Stone Sword
description: Basic sword. Crafted from 2 cobblestone and 1 stick.

name: Iron Sword
description: Durable sword. Crafted from 2 iron ingots and 1 stick.

name: Diamond Sword
description: Fast, durable sword. Crafted from 2 diamonds and 1 stick.

name: Netherite Sword
description: The strongest sword. Upgrade a diamond sword with a netherite ingot.

name: Wooden Shovel
description: Basic shovel for dirt and sand. Crafted from 1 plank and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Shovel
description: Better shovel. Crafted from 1 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Shovel
description: Durable shovel. Crafted from 1 iron ingot and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Shovel
description: Very fast shovel. Crafted from 1 diamond and 2 sticks.

name: Bow
description: Ranged weapon that shoots arrows. Crafted from sticks and string.

name: Arrow
description: Ammo for bows and crossbows. Crafted from flint, stick, and feather.

name: Crossbow
description: Ranged weapon that can be loaded with arrows. Crafted from sticks, iron, string, and tripwire.

name: Shield
description: Blocks incoming attacks. Crafted from wood planks and an iron ingot.

name: Leather Helmet
description: Basic armor with low protection. Crafted from leather.

name: Iron Helmet
description: Mid-tier armor. Crafted from iron ingots.

name: Diamond Helmet
description: High-tier armor. Crafted from diamonds.

name: Netherite Helmet
description: Best armor. Upgrade diamond helmet with netherite ingot.

name: Stick
description: Basic crafting material. Crafted from two planks.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Metal used for tools, armor, and many recipes. Smelted from iron ore.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Metal used for powered rails, golden apples, and armor. Smelted from gold ore.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Metal used for lightning rods, telescopes, and building blocks. Smelted from copper ore.

name: Diamond
description: Rare gem used for the best tools and armor. Found deep underground.

name: Emerald
description: Currency used for trading with villagers. Found in mountain biomes and trading.

name: Redstone Dust
description: Used for circuits, automation, and powered mechanisms.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: Used for enchanting and blue dye. Mined from lapis ore.

name: Coal
description: Fuel and light source. Mined from coal ore or dropped from Wither skeletons.

name: Charcoal
description: Fuel made by smelting wood. Can be used like coal.

name: Flint
description: Used for flint and steel and arrows. Dropped from gravel.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Used to ignite fire, TNT, and nether portals. Crafted from flint and iron ingot.

name: Torch
description: Provides light. Crafted from coal and a stick.

name: Bed
description: Sets spawn point and skips the night. Crafted from wool and planks.

name: Bucket
description: Holds water, lava, milk, or powder snow. Crafted from iron ingots.

name: Water Bucket
description: A bucket filled with water. Used to transport water and make obsidian.

name: Lava Bucket
description: A bucket filled with lava. Used as furnace fuel and to make obsidian.

name: Compass
description: Points to the world spawn. Crafted from iron ingots and redstone.

name: Clock
description: Shows the time of day. Crafted from gold ingots and redstone.

name: Map
description: Shows the explored area. Crafted from paper and a compass.

name: Book
description: Used for bookshelves, enchanted books, and book and quill. Crafted from paper and leather.

name: Paper
description: Made from sugar cane. Used for maps and books.

name: Leather
description: Dropped from cows and horses. Used for armor and books.

name: Feather
description: Dropped from chickens and parrots. Used for arrows and books.

name: String
description: Dropped from spiders and cave spiders. Used for bows, wool, and tripwire.

name: Gunpowder
description: Dropped from creepers, ghasts, and witches. Used for TNT and firework rockets.

name: Bone
description: Dropped from skeletons. Used for bonemeal and taming wolves.

name: Bone Meal
description: Used to speed up crop growth and create white dye. Crafted from bones.

name: Ender Pearl
description: Dropped from Endermen. Used to teleport or craft Eyes of Ender.

name: Blaze Rod
description: Dropped from Blazes. Used for brewing, blaze powder, and eyes of ender.

name: Ghast Tear
description: Dropped from Ghasts. Used for regeneration potions.

name: Nether Wart
description: Grown on soul sand. Base ingredient for most potions.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Grows near water. Used for sugar and paper.

name: Wheat
description: Grown on farmland. Used for bread and breeding cows.

name: Bread
description: Food item crafted from wheat. Restores hunger.

name: Carrot
description: Grown on farmland. Used for food, breeding pigs, and rabbits.

name: Potato
description: Grown on farmland. Can be baked into a baked potato.

name: Beetroot
description: Grown on farmland. Used for beetroot soup and breeding pigs.

name: Melon Slice
description: Food from melons. Can be crafted into glistering melons.

name: Pumpkin
description: Grown on farmland. Used for jack o'lanterns, pumpkin pie, and golems.

name: Apple
description: Dropped from oak leaves. Used for golden apples.

name: Golden Apple
description: Powerful food that grants absorption and regeneration. Crafted from gold and an apple.

name: Enchanted Golden Apple
description: Rare golden apple with strong effects. Found in chests.

name: Raw Beef
description: Dropped from cows. Cook into steak for better hunger restoration.

name: Steak
description: Cooked beef. One of the best food sources.

name: Raw Porkchop
description: Dropped from pigs and hoglins. Cook into cooked porkchop.

name: Cooked Porkchop
description: Cooked pork. Good food source.

name: Raw Chicken
description: Dropped from chickens. May cause hunger. Cook for better results.

name: Cooked Chicken
description: Cooked chicken. Good food source.

name: Rotten Flesh
description: Low hunger restoration, may cause hunger. Dropped from zombies.

name: Spider Eye
description: Dropped from spiders and witches. Used for brewing poison potions.

name: Poisonous Potato
description: Rare potato drop. Poisons when eaten.

name: Raw Cod
description: Fish caught in water. Cook for better food.

name: Raw Salmon
description: Fish caught in cold water. Cook for better food.

name: Tropical Fish
description: Colorful fish caught in warm oceans. No use in crafting.

name: Pufferfish
description: Inflating fish. Used for water breathing potions. Poisonous to eat.
